en.cmd.open_desc: Show all editor workspaces in a floating selector
en.cmd.new_desc: Spawn a new editor workspace in a worktree
en.cmd.kill_desc: Close the workspace highlighted in the open Orchestrator prompt
en.cmd.dock_toggle_desc: Show/hide the persistent left workspace dock (↑↓ switches windows live)
en.list.title: ORCHESTRATOR :: Workspaces
en.preview.title: Preview
en.preview.click_to_open: Click it (or press Enter) to open this worktree as a workspace.
en.confirm.stop_line1: • send SIGTERM to all workspace processes
en.confirm.stop_line2: • SIGKILL after a short grace period
en.confirm.stop_note: The worktree and workspace record remain.
en.dock.title: Orchestrator
en.form.create_worktree: Create a new git worktree for this workspace
en.form.create_worktree_disabled: [ ] Create a new git worktree for this workspace
en.form.linked_worktree_uncheck: ↳ existing worktree here — uncheck to attach instead of forking a new one
en.form.linked_worktree_attach: ↳ existing worktree — this workspace will attach to it
en.form.ssh_options_placeholder: -J jump-host  ·  -o ProxyCommand=…  (passed to every ssh call)
en.form.k8s_target_placeholder: named target, or leave blank to attach explicitly ↓
en.form.k8s_hint: ⓘ kubectl exec into the pod — any cluster (EKS/GKE/AKS/k3d)
en.status.replacement_failed: Orchestrator: could not open a replacement workspace — %{error}
en.status.stop_sent: Orchestrator: stop signal sent to %{count} workspace(s)
en.status.kill_open_list_first: Orchestrator: open the workspace list (Ctrl+P → Orchestrator: Open) first
en.status.kill_select_row: Orchestrator: select a workspace row first
en.status.kill_dive_elsewhere: Orchestrator: dive elsewhere first, then kill this workspace
en.err.nothing_eligible: nothing eligible to %{action} in the selection
en.err.k8s_named_target: Named .fresh/k8s.json targets — use “K8s: Connect Workspace” (full provider support). Inline attach needs an explicit Pod.
en.err.k8s_ns_pod_required: Kubernetes: Namespace and Pod are required (or use “K8s: Connect Workspace”).
en.err.ssh_host_required: SSH: a host is required (host, user@host, or ssh://host).
en.err.devcontainer_unsupported: Devcontainer: open the project and run “Dev Containers: Reopen in Container”. (Orchestrator-managed devcontainer workspaces are coming next.)

cs.cmd.open_desc: Zobrazit všechny pracovní prostory editoru v plovoucím výběru
cs.cmd.new_desc: Spustit nový pracovní prostor editoru ve worktree
cs.cmd.kill_desc: Zavřít pracovní prostor zvýrazněný v otevřeném dialogu Orchestrator
cs.cmd.dock_toggle_desc: Zobrazit/skrýt trvalý levý dok pracovních prostorů (↑↓ přepíná okna živě)

cs.preview.title: Náhled

cs.confirm.for_each: Pro každý pracovní prostor to provede:
cs.confirm.stop_line1: • odeslat SIGTERM všem procesům pracovního prostoru
cs.confirm.stop_note: Worktree a záznam pracovního prostoru zůstanou.
cs.dock.title: Orchestrator
cs.form.create_worktree: Vytvořit nový git worktree pro tento pracovní prostor
cs.form.create_worktree_disabled: [ ] Vytvořit nový git worktree pro tento pracovní prostor
cs.form.linked_worktree_uncheck: ↳ zde existuje worktree — odškrtněte pro připojení místo vytvoření nového
cs.form.linked_worktree_attach: ↳ existující worktree — tento pracovní prostor se k němu připojí

cs.status.start_failed: Orchestrator: nepodařilo se spustit pracovní prostor — %{error}
cs.status.attach_failed: Orchestrator: nepodařilo se připojit pracovní prostor — %{error}
cs.status.kill_open_list_first: Orchestrator: nejprve otevřete seznam pracovních prostorů (Ctrl+P → Orchestrator: Otevřít)
cs.status.kill_no_selected: Orchestrator: není vybrán žádný pracovní prostor
cs.status.kill_select_row: Orchestrator: nejprve vyberte řádek pracovního prostoru
cs.status.kill_dive_elsewhere: Orchestrator: nejprve přejděte jinam, poté ukončete tento pracovní prostor
cs.err.nothing_eligible: ve výběru není nic vhodného k akci %{action}
cs.err.k8s_named_target: Pojmenované cíle .fresh/k8s.json — použijte „K8s: Connect Workspace“ (plná podpora poskytovatele). Inline připojení vyžaduje explicitní Pod.
cs.err.k8s_ns_pod_required: Kubernetes: Jmenný prostor a Pod jsou povinné (nebo použijte „K8s: Connect Workspace“).
cs.err.ssh_host_required: SSH: hostitel je povinný (host, user@host, nebo ssh://host).
cs.err.devcontainer_unsupported: Devcontainer: otevřete projekt a spusťte „Dev Containers: Reopen in Container“. (Pracovní prostory devcontaineru spravované Orchestratorem budou následovat.)

de.cmd.open_desc: Alle Editor-Arbeitsbereiche in einer schwebenden Auswahl anzeigen
de.cmd.new_desc: Einen neuen Editor-Arbeitsbereich in einem worktree erzeugen

de.status.attach_failed: Orchestrator: Arbeitsbereich konnte nicht angehängt werden — %{error}

de.status.kill_dive_elsewhere: Orchestrator: zuerst zu einem anderen Arbeitsbereich wechseln, dann diesen beenden

de.err.k8s_named_target: Benannte .fresh/k8s.json-Ziele — verwende „K8s: Connect Workspace“ (volle Provider-Unterstützung). Inline-Anhängen benötigt einen expliziten Pod.
de.err.k8s_ns_pod_required: Kubernetes: Namespace und Pod sind erforderlich (oder verwende „K8s: Connect Workspace“).
de.err.ssh_host_required: SSH: ein Host ist erforderlich (host, user@host oder ssh://host).
de.err.devcontainer_unsupported: Devcontainer: öffne das Projekt und führe „Dev Containers: Reopen in Container“ aus. (Orchestrator-verwaltete Devcontainer-Arbeitsbereiche folgen als Nächstes.)

es.cmd.open_desc: Mostrar todos los espacios de trabajo del editor en un selector flotante
es.cmd.new_desc: Crear un nuevo espacio de trabajo del editor en un worktree
es.cmd.kill_desc: Cerrar el espacio de trabajo resaltado en el prompt abierto de Orchestrator
es.cmd.dock_toggle_desc: Mostrar/ocultar el dock izquierdo persistente de espacios de trabajo (↑↓ cambia ventanas en vivo)
es.list.title: ORCHESTRATOR :: Espacios de trabajo
es.list.show_trivial: Mostrar espacios de trabajo vacíos/de 1 archivo
es.list.show_trivial_key: Mostrar espacios de trabajo vacíos/de 1 archivo   (%{key})
es.preview.title: Vista previa
es.preview.click_to_open: Haz clic en él (o pulsa Enter) para abrir este worktree como espacio de trabajo.
es.confirm.for_each: Para cada espacio de trabajo esto hará:
es.confirm.uncommitted_lost: Se perderán los cambios sin confirmar.
es.confirm.stop_line1: • enviar SIGTERM a todos los procesos del espacio de trabajo
es.confirm.stop_line2: • SIGKILL tras un breve periodo de gracia
es.confirm.stop_note: El worktree y el registro del espacio de trabajo permanecen.
es.confirm.archive_line1: • SIGKILL a todos los procesos del espacio de trabajo
es.confirm.archive_line2: • cerrar el espacio de trabajo del editor
es.confirm.delete_line1: • detener todos los procesos del espacio de trabajo
es.confirm.delete_line3: • descartar el registro del espacio de trabajo
es.dock.title: Orchestrator
es.form.create_worktree: Crear un nuevo git worktree para este espacio de trabajo
es.form.create_worktree_disabled: [ ] Crear un nuevo git worktree para este espacio de trabajo
es.form.linked_worktree_uncheck: ↳ worktree existente aquí — desmarca para adjuntarlo en vez de crear uno nuevo
es.form.linked_worktree_attach: ↳ worktree existente — este espacio de trabajo se adjuntará a él
es.form.ssh_options_placeholder: -J jump-host  ·  -o ProxyCommand=…  (se pasa a cada llamada ssh)
es.form.k8s_target_placeholder: destino con nombre, o deja en blanco para adjuntar explícitamente ↓
es.form.k8s_hint: ⓘ kubectl exec dentro del pod — cualquier clúster (EKS/GKE/AKS/k3d)
es.form.cmd_placeholder_ssh: shell de inicio de sesión remoto  (borra para restablecer)
es.status.replacement_failed: Orchestrator: no se pudo abrir un espacio de trabajo de reemplazo — %{error}
es.status.stop_sent: Orchestrator: señal de detención enviada a %{count} espacio(s) de trabajo
es.status.start_failed: Orchestrator: error al iniciar el espacio de trabajo — %{error}
es.status.attach_failed: Orchestrator: error al adjuntar el espacio de trabajo — %{error}
es.status.kill_open_list_first: Orchestrator: abre primero la lista de espacios de trabajo (Ctrl+P → Orchestrator: Abrir)
es.status.kill_no_selected: Orchestrator: ningún espacio de trabajo seleccionado
es.status.kill_select_row: Orchestrator: selecciona primero una fila de espacio de trabajo
es.status.kill_dive_elsewhere: Orchestrator: entra en otro lugar primero, luego cierra este espacio de trabajo
es.err.nothing_eligible: nada elegible para %{action} en la selección
es.err.no_eligible_selected: ningún espacio de trabajo seleccionado puede ser %{verb}
es.err.workspace_gone: el espacio de trabajo ya no existe
es.err.k8s_named_target: Destinos con nombre de .fresh/k8s.json — usa “K8s: Connect Workspace” (soporte completo del proveedor). El adjuntado en línea necesita un Pod explícito.
es.err.k8s_ns_pod_required: Kubernetes: Namespace y Pod son obligatorios (o usa “K8s: Connect Workspace”).
es.err.ssh_host_required: SSH: se requiere un host (host, user@host o ssh://host).
es.err.devcontainer_unsupported: Devcontainer: abre el proyecto y ejecuta “Dev Containers: Reopen in Container”. (Los espacios de trabajo devcontainer gestionados por Orchestrator llegarán próximamente.)

fr.cmd.open_desc: Afficher tous les espaces de travail de l'éditeur dans un sélecteur flottant
fr.cmd.new_desc: Créer un nouvel espace de travail de l'éditeur dans un worktree
fr.cmd.kill_desc: Fermer l'espace de travail mis en évidence dans l'invite Orchestrator ouverte
fr.cmd.dock_toggle_desc: Afficher/masquer le dock persistant des espaces de travail à gauche (↑↓ change de fenêtre en direct)

fr.list.show_trivial: Afficher les espaces de travail vides/à 1 fichier
fr.list.show_trivial_key: Afficher les espaces de travail vides/à 1 fichier   (%{key})

fr.confirm.uncommitted_lost: Les modifications non validées seront perdues.

fr.confirm.stop_line2: • SIGKILL après un court délai de grâce
fr.confirm.stop_note: Le worktree et l'enregistrement de l'espace de travail sont conservés.
fr.confirm.archive_line1: • SIGKILL tous les processus de l'espace de travail
fr.confirm.archive_line2: • fermer l'espace de travail de l'éditeur
fr.confirm.delete_line1: • arrêter tous les processus de l'espace de travail
fr.confirm.delete_line3: • supprimer l'enregistrement de l'espace de travail

fr.form.detecting_project_root: détection de la racine du projet…
fr.form.create_worktree: Créer un nouveau worktree git pour cet espace de travail
fr.form.create_worktree_disabled: [ ] Créer un nouveau worktree git pour cet espace de travail
fr.form.linked_worktree_uncheck: ↳ worktree existant ici — décochez pour l'attacher au lieu de forker un nouveau
fr.form.linked_worktree_attach: ↳ worktree existant — cet espace de travail s'y attachera
fr.form.detecting_default_branch: détection de la branche par défaut…
fr.form.ssh_options_placeholder: -J jump-host  ·  -o ProxyCommand=…  (passées à chaque appel ssh)
fr.form.k8s_target_placeholder: cible nommée, ou laisser vide pour attacher explicitement ↓

fr.status.replacement_failed: Orchestrator : impossible d'ouvrir un espace de travail de remplacement — %{error}

fr.status.start_failed: Orchestrator : échec du démarrage de l'espace de travail — %{error}
fr.status.attach_failed: Orchestrator : échec de l'attachement de l'espace de travail — %{error}
fr.status.kill_open_list_first: Orchestrator : ouvrez d'abord la liste des espaces de travail (Ctrl+P → Orchestrator : ouvrir)
fr.status.kill_no_selected: Orchestrator : aucun espace de travail sélectionné
fr.status.kill_select_row: Orchestrator : sélectionnez d'abord une ligne d'espace de travail
fr.status.kill_dive_elsewhere: Orchestrator : passez d'abord à un autre, puis fermez cet espace de travail
fr.err.nothing_eligible: rien d'éligible à %{action} dans la sélection
fr.err.no_eligible_selected: aucun espace de travail sélectionné ne peut être %{verb}
fr.err.worktree_remove_failed: échec de la suppression du worktree
fr.err.k8s_named_target: Cibles .fresh/k8s.json nommées — utilisez « K8s: Connect Workspace » (prise en charge complète du fournisseur). L'attachement en ligne nécessite un Pod explicite.
fr.err.k8s_ns_pod_required: Kubernetes : Namespace et Pod sont requis (ou utilisez « K8s: Connect Workspace »).
fr.err.ssh_host_required: SSH : un hôte est requis (host, user@host, ou ssh://host).
fr.err.devcontainer_unsupported: Devcontainer : ouvrez le projet et exécutez « Dev Containers: Reopen in Container ». (Les espaces de travail devcontainer gérés par Orchestrator arrivent bientôt.)

it.cmd.open_desc: Mostra tutti gli spazi di lavoro dell'editor in un selettore fluttuante
it.cmd.new_desc: Crea un nuovo spazio di lavoro dell'editor in un worktree
it.cmd.kill_desc: Chiude lo spazio di lavoro evidenziato nel prompt di Orchestrator aperto
it.cmd.dock_toggle_desc: Mostra/nascondi il dock persistente degli spazi di lavoro a sinistra (↑↓ cambia le finestre in tempo reale)
it.list.title: ORCHESTRATOR :: Spazi di lavoro
it.list.show_trivial: Mostra spazi di lavoro vuoti/con 1 file
it.list.show_trivial_key: Mostra spazi di lavoro vuoti/con 1 file   (%{key})
it.preview.title: Anteprima
it.preview.click_to_open: Fai clic (o premi Enter) per aprire questo worktree come spazio di lavoro.
it.confirm.for_each: Per ogni spazio di lavoro verrà eseguito:
it.confirm.uncommitted_lost: Le modifiche non salvate andranno perse.
it.confirm.stop_line1: • invia SIGTERM a tutti i processi dello spazio di lavoro
it.confirm.stop_line2: • SIGKILL dopo un breve periodo di grazia
it.confirm.stop_note: Il worktree e il record dello spazio di lavoro rimangono.
it.confirm.archive_line1: • SIGKILL a tutti i processi dello spazio di lavoro
it.confirm.archive_line2: • chiudi lo spazio di lavoro dell'editor
it.confirm.delete_line1: • ferma tutti i processi dello spazio di lavoro
it.confirm.delete_line3: • elimina il record dello spazio di lavoro
it.dock.title: Orchestrator
it.form.create_worktree: Crea un nuovo git worktree per questo spazio di lavoro
it.form.create_worktree_disabled: [ ] Crea un nuovo git worktree per questo spazio di lavoro
it.form.linked_worktree_uncheck: ↳ worktree esistente qui — deseleziona per collegarti invece di crearne uno nuovo
it.form.linked_worktree_attach: ↳ worktree esistente — questo spazio di lavoro vi si collegherà

it.form.k8s_target_placeholder: destinazione con nome, o lascia vuoto per collegarti esplicitamente ↓

it.status.start_failed: Orchestrator: avvio dello spazio di lavoro non riuscito — %{error}
it.status.attach_failed: Orchestrator: collegamento dello spazio di lavoro non riuscito — %{error}
it.status.kill_open_list_first: Orchestrator: apri prima l'elenco degli spazi di lavoro (Ctrl+P → Orchestrator: Apri)
it.status.kill_no_selected: Orchestrator: nessuno spazio di lavoro selezionato
it.status.kill_select_row: Orchestrator: seleziona prima una riga di spazio di lavoro
it.status.kill_dive_elsewhere: Orchestrator: entra prima altrove, poi chiudi questo spazio di lavoro

it.err.no_eligible_selected: nessuno spazio di lavoro selezionato può essere %{verb}
it.err.workspace_gone: spazio di lavoro non più disponibile
it.err.k8s_named_target: Destinazioni .fresh/k8s.json con nome — usa “K8s: Connect Workspace” (supporto completo del provider). Il collegamento inline richiede un Pod esplicito.
it.err.k8s_ns_pod_required: Kubernetes: Namespace e Pod sono obbligatori (oppure usa “K8s: Connect Workspace”).
it.err.ssh_host_required: SSH: è obbligatorio un host (host, user@host, oppure ssh://host).
it.err.devcontainer_unsupported: Devcontainer: apri il progetto ed esegui “Dev Containers: Reopen in Container”. (Gli spazi di lavoro devcontainer gestiti da Orchestrator arriveranno presto.)

pt-BR.cmd.open_desc: Mostrar todos os espaços de trabalho do editor em um seletor flutuante
pt-BR.cmd.new_desc: Criar um novo espaço de trabalho do editor em um worktree

pt-BR.cmd.dock_toggle_desc: Mostrar/ocultar o dock fixo de espaços de trabalho à esquerda (↑↓ alterna janelas ao vivo)

pt-BR.confirm.for_each: Para cada espaço de trabalho, isto irá:
pt-BR.confirm.uncommitted_lost: As alterações não confirmadas serão perdidas.

pt-BR.confirm.stop_line2: • SIGKILL após um curto período de tolerância

pt-BR.confirm.archive_line2: • fechar o espaço de trabalho do editor
pt-BR.confirm.delete_line1: • parar todos os processos do espaço de trabalho
pt-BR.confirm.delete_line3: • descartar o registro do espaço de trabalho
pt-BR.dock.title: Orchestrator

pt-BR.form.create_worktree_disabled: [ ] Criar um novo worktree do git para este espaço de trabalho

pt-BR.form.cmd_placeholder_ssh: shell de login remoto  (limpe para redefinir)
pt-BR.status.replacement_failed: Orchestrator: não foi possível abrir um espaço de trabalho substituto — %{error}
pt-BR.status.stop_sent: Orchestrator: sinal de parada enviado a %{count} espaço(s) de trabalho
pt-BR.status.start_failed: Orchestrator: falha ao iniciar o espaço de trabalho — %{error}
pt-BR.status.attach_failed: Orchestrator: falha ao anexar o espaço de trabalho — %{error}
pt-BR.status.kill_open_list_first: Orchestrator: abra primeiro a lista de espaços de trabalho (Ctrl+P → Orchestrator: Abrir)
pt-BR.status.kill_no_selected: Orchestrator: nenhum espaço de trabalho selecionado
pt-BR.status.kill_select_row: Orchestrator: selecione primeiro uma linha de espaço de trabalho
pt-BR.status.kill_dive_elsewhere: Orchestrator: entre em outro lugar primeiro, depois encerre este espaço de trabalho
pt-BR.err.no_eligible_selected: nenhum espaço de trabalho selecionado pode ser %{verb}
pt-BR.err.k8s_named_target: Alvos nomeados em .fresh/k8s.json — use “K8s: Connect Workspace” (suporte completo ao provedor). O anexo inline precisa de um Pod explícito.
pt-BR.err.k8s_ns_pod_required: Kubernetes: Namespace e Pod são obrigatórios (ou use “K8s: Connect Workspace”).
pt-BR.err.ssh_host_required: SSH: um host é obrigatório (host, user@host ou ssh://host).
pt-BR.err.devcontainer_unsupported: Devcontainer: abra o projeto e execute “Dev Containers: Reopen in Container”. (Espaços de trabalho devcontainer gerenciados pelo Orchestrator chegam em breve.)

th.status.replacement_failed: Orchestrator: ไม่สามารถเปิดพื้นที่ทำงานทดแทนได้ — %{error}
th.status.stop_sent: Orchestrator: ส่งสัญญาณหยุดไปยังพื้นที่ทำงาน %{count} รายการแล้ว
th.status.bulk_done: Orchestrator: %{verb}พื้นที่ทำงาน %{count} รายการ
th.status.verb_archived: เก็บถาวรแล้ว
th.status.start_failed: Orchestrator: เริ่มพื้นที่ทำงานไม่สำเร็จ — %{error}
th.status.attach_failed: Orchestrator: แนบพื้นที่ทำงานไม่สำเร็จ — %{error}
th.status.kill_open_list_first: Orchestrator: เปิดรายการพื้นที่ทำงานก่อน (Ctrl+P → Orchestrator: เปิด)
th.status.kill_no_selected: Orchestrator: ไม่ได้เลือกพื้นที่ทำงาน
th.status.kill_select_row: Orchestrator: เลือกแถวพื้นที่ทำงานก่อน
th.status.kill_dive_elsewhere: Orchestrator: สลับไปที่อื่นก่อน แล้วจึงปิดพื้นที่ทำงานนี้
th.err.nothing_eligible: ไม่มีรายการที่เข้าเกณฑ์ให้%{action}ในส่วนที่เลือก
th.err.partial_done: %{verb} %{ok}/%{total}; ข้อผิดพลาดล่าสุด: %{error}
th.err.unknown_error: ข้อผิดพลาดที่ไม่ทราบสาเหตุ
th.err.no_eligible_selected: ไม่มีพื้นที่ทำงานที่เลือกซึ่งสามารถ%{verb}ได้
th.err.workspace_gone: พื้นที่ทำงานหายไปแล้ว
th.err.not_git_repo: ไม่ใช่ที่เก็บ git
th.err.could_not_create: ไม่สามารถสร้าง %{path}
th.err.worktree_move_failed: ย้าย worktree ไม่สำเร็จ
th.err.worktree_remove_failed: ลบ worktree ไม่สำเร็จ
th.err.worktree_add_failed: git worktree add ไม่สำเร็จ
th.err.mkdir_failed: mkdir ไม่สำเร็จ: %{path}
th.err.connection_failed: เชื่อมต่อไม่สำเร็จ
th.err.k8s_named_target: เป้าหมายที่ตั้งชื่อใน .fresh/k8s.json — ใช้ “K8s: Connect Workspace” (รองรับผู้ให้บริการเต็มรูปแบบ) การแนบแบบอินไลน์ต้องระบุ Pod อย่างชัดเจน
th.err.k8s_ns_pod_required: Kubernetes: ต้องระบุ Namespace และ Pod (หรือใช้ “K8s: Connect Workspace”)
th.err.ssh_host_required: SSH: ต้องระบุ host (host, user@host หรือ ssh://host)
th.err.devcontainer_unsupported: Devcontainer: เปิดโปรเจกต์แล้วรัน “Dev Containers: Reopen in Container” (พื้นที่ทำงาน devcontainer ที่จัดการโดย Orchestrator กำลังจะมาในเร็ว ๆ นี้)

uk.cmd.open_desc: Показати всі робочі області редактора у плаваючому селекторі
uk.cmd.new_desc: Створити нову робочу область редактора у worktree
uk.cmd.kill_desc: Закрити робочу область, виділену у відкритому запиті Orchestrator
uk.cmd.dock_toggle_desc: Показати/сховати постійний лівий док робочих областей (↑↓ перемикає вікна наживо)
uk.list.title: ORCHESTRATOR :: Робочі області
uk.preview.title: Перегляд
uk.preview.click_to_open: Клацніть її (або натисніть Enter), щоб відкрити цей worktree як робочу область.
uk.confirm.for_each: Для кожної робочої області це призведе до:
uk.confirm.stop_line1: • надіслати SIGTERM усім процесам робочої області
uk.confirm.stop_note: worktree та запис робочої області залишаться.
uk.dock.title: Orchestrator
uk.form.create_worktree: Створити новий git worktree для цієї робочої області
uk.form.create_worktree_disabled: [ ] Створити новий git worktree для цієї робочої області
uk.form.linked_worktree_uncheck: ↳ тут уже є worktree — зніміть позначку, щоб приєднатися замість створення нового
uk.form.linked_worktree_attach: ↳ наявний worktree — ця робоча область приєднається до нього
uk.form.k8s_target_placeholder: іменована ціль, або залиште порожнім для явного приєднання ↓
uk.form.k8s_hint: ⓘ kubectl exec у pod — будь-який кластер (EKS/GKE/AKS/k3d)
uk.status.replacement_failed: Orchestrator: не вдалося відкрити замінну робочу область — %{error}
uk.status.stop_sent: Orchestrator: сигнал зупинки надіслано до %{count} робочих областей
uk.status.start_failed: Orchestrator: не вдалося запустити робочу область — %{error}
uk.status.attach_failed: Orchestrator: не вдалося приєднати робочу область — %{error}
uk.status.kill_open_list_first: Orchestrator: спершу відкрийте список робочих областей (Ctrl+P → Orchestrator: Відкрити)
uk.status.kill_select_row: Orchestrator: спершу виберіть рядок робочої області
uk.status.kill_dive_elsewhere: Orchestrator: спершу перейдіть деінде, потім закрийте цю робочу область
uk.err.nothing_eligible: немає нічого придатного для дії %{action} у виборі
uk.err.no_eligible_selected: жодну вибрану робочу область не можна %{verb}
uk.err.k8s_named_target: Іменовані цілі .fresh/k8s.json — використовуйте “K8s: Connect Workspace” (повна підтримка провайдера). Вбудоване приєднання потребує явного Pod.
uk.err.k8s_ns_pod_required: Kubernetes: Простір імен і Pod є обов’язковими (або використовуйте “K8s: Connect Workspace”).
uk.err.ssh_host_required: SSH: потрібен хост (host, user@host, або ssh://host).
uk.err.devcontainer_unsupported: Devcontainer: відкрийте проєкт і виконайте “Dev Containers: Reopen in Container”. (Робочі області devcontainer, керовані Orchestrator, з’являться згодом.)

vi.cmd.open_desc: Hiển thị tất cả không gian làm việc của trình soạn thảo trong bộ chọn nổi
vi.cmd.new: Orchestrator: Không gian làm việc mới
vi.cmd.new_desc: Tạo một không gian làm việc mới của trình soạn thảo trong một worktree
vi.cmd.kill_desc: Đóng không gian làm việc đang được tô sáng trong lời nhắc Orchestrator đang mở
vi.cmd.dock_toggle_desc: Hiện/ẩn dock không gian làm việc cố định bên trái (↑↓ chuyển cửa sổ trực tiếp)
vi.list.title: ORCHESTRATOR :: Không gian làm việc
vi.list.show_trivial: Hiện không gian làm việc trống/1-tệp
vi.list.show_trivial_key: Hiện không gian làm việc trống/1-tệp   (%{key})
vi.preview.title: Xem trước
vi.preview.no_workspace_selected: Chưa chọn không gian làm việc
vi.preview.click_to_open: Nhấp vào nó (hoặc nhấn Enter) để mở worktree này thành một không gian làm việc.
vi.preview.label_launch: %{name}  —  khởi chạy không gian làm việc
vi.confirm.for_each: Với mỗi không gian làm việc, thao tác này sẽ:
vi.confirm.uncommitted_lost: Các thay đổi chưa commit sẽ bị mất.
vi.confirm.label_bulk: Xác nhận %{cap} — %{count} không gian làm việc
vi.confirm.stop_line1: • gửi SIGTERM tới tất cả tiến trình của không gian làm việc
vi.confirm.stop_line2: • SIGKILL sau một khoảng ân hạn ngắn
vi.confirm.stop_note: Worktree và bản ghi không gian làm việc vẫn được giữ lại.
vi.confirm.archive_line1: • SIGKILL tất cả tiến trình của không gian làm việc
vi.confirm.archive_line2: • đóng không gian làm việc của trình soạn thảo
vi.confirm.archive_note: Có thể hoàn tác qua Bỏ lưu trữ.
vi.confirm.delete_line1: • dừng tất cả tiến trình của không gian làm việc
vi.confirm.delete_line3: • bỏ bản ghi không gian làm việc
vi.confirm.bulk_label: Thao tác hàng loạt — đã chọn %{count}
vi.dock.title: Orchestrator
vi.form.agent_hint_resume: ←/→ chọn · ↻ tiếp tục khi khởi động lại
vi.form.detecting_project_root: đang dò thư mục gốc dự án…
vi.form.create_worktree: Tạo một git worktree mới cho không gian làm việc này
vi.form.create_worktree_disabled: [ ] Tạo một git worktree mới cho không gian làm việc này
vi.form.linked_worktree_uncheck: ↳ đã có worktree ở đây — bỏ chọn để gắn vào thay vì tách ra một worktree mới
vi.form.linked_worktree_attach: ↳ worktree đã có — không gian làm việc này sẽ gắn vào nó
vi.form.devcontainer_hint: ⓘ chạy `devcontainer up`, rồi gắn vào (docker exec)
vi.form.ssh_options_placeholder: -J jump-host  ·  -o ProxyCommand=…  (truyền cho mọi lệnh ssh)
vi.form.k8s_target_placeholder: target có tên, hoặc để trống để gắn vào tường minh ↓
vi.form.k8s_workspace_label: Đường dẫn không gian làm việc
vi.form.k8s_hint: ⓘ kubectl exec vào pod — mọi cụm (EKS/GKE/AKS/k3d)
vi.form.creating_workspace: Đang tạo không gian làm việc…
vi.form.cmd_placeholder_ssh: shell đăng nhập từ xa  (xóa để đặt lại)
vi.status.replacement_failed: Orchestrator: không thể mở không gian làm việc thay thế — %{error}
vi.status.stop_sent: Orchestrator: đã gửi tín hiệu dừng tới %{count} không gian làm việc
vi.status.start_failed: Orchestrator: không khởi động được không gian làm việc — %{error}
vi.status.attach_failed: Orchestrator: không gắn được không gian làm việc — %{error}
vi.status.kill_open_list_first: Orchestrator: hãy mở danh sách không gian làm việc trước (Ctrl+P → Orchestrator: Mở)
vi.status.kill_no_selected: Orchestrator: chưa chọn không gian làm việc
vi.status.kill_select_row: Orchestrator: hãy chọn một dòng không gian làm việc trước
vi.status.kill_dive_elsewhere: Orchestrator: hãy chuyển sang nơi khác trước, rồi đóng không gian làm việc này
vi.err.nothing_eligible: không có gì đủ điều kiện để %{action} trong lựa chọn
vi.err.no_eligible_selected: không có không gian làm việc đã chọn nào có thể %{verb}
vi.err.workspace_gone: không gian làm việc đã biến mất
vi.err.k8s_named_target: Các target .fresh/k8s.json có tên — dùng “K8s: Connect Workspace” (hỗ trợ đầy đủ provider). Gắn nội tuyến cần một Pod tường minh.
vi.err.k8s_ns_pod_required: Kubernetes: Namespace và Pod là bắt buộc (hoặc dùng “K8s: Connect Workspace”).
vi.err.ssh_host_required: SSH: cần một host (host, user@host, hoặc ssh://host).
vi.err.devcontainer_unsupported: Devcontainer: mở dự án và chạy “Dev Containers: Reopen in Container”. (Không gian làm việc devcontainer do Orchestrator quản lý sẽ có ở bản tiếp theo.)

zh-CN.cmd.open_desc: 在浮动选择器中显示所有编辑器工作区
zh-CN.cmd.new_desc: 在 worktree 中启动新的编辑器工作区
zh-CN.cmd.kill_desc: 关闭在打开的 Orchestrator 提示框中高亮的工作区
zh-CN.cmd.dock_toggle_desc: 显示/隐藏常驻的左侧工作区停靠栏（↑↓ 实时切换窗口）
zh-CN.list.title: ORCHESTRATOR :: 工作区
zh-CN.preview.title: 预览
zh-CN.preview.click_to_open: 点击它（或按 Enter）以将此 worktree 作为工作区打开。
zh-CN.confirm.uncommitted_lost: 未提交的更改将会丢失。
zh-CN.confirm.stop_line1: • 向所有工作区进程发送 SIGTERM
zh-CN.confirm.stop_line2: • 短暂宽限期后发送 SIGKILL
zh-CN.confirm.stop_note: worktree 和工作区记录将保留。
zh-CN.confirm.archive_line1: • 向所有工作区进程发送 SIGKILL
zh-CN.confirm.bulk_label: 批量操作 — 已选 %{count} 个
zh-CN.dock.title: Orchestrator
zh-CN.form.create_worktree: 为此工作区创建新的 git worktree
zh-CN.form.create_worktree_disabled: [ ] 为此工作区创建新的 git worktree
zh-CN.form.linked_worktree_uncheck: ↳ 此处已有 worktree — 取消勾选以附加，而非分叉新的
zh-CN.form.linked_worktree_attach: ↳ 已有 worktree — 此工作区将附加到它
zh-CN.form.devcontainer_hint: ⓘ 运行 `devcontainer up`，然后附加（docker exec）
zh-CN.form.ssh_options_placeholder: -J jump-host  ·  -o ProxyCommand=…  （传递给每次 ssh 调用）
zh-CN.form.k8s_target_placeholder: 命名目标，或留空以显式附加 ↓
zh-CN.form.k8s_hint: ⓘ kubectl exec 进入 pod — 任意集群 (EKS/GKE/AKS/k3d)
zh-CN.form.cmd_placeholder_ssh: 远程登录 shell  （清空以重置）
zh-CN.status.stop_sent: Orchestrator：已向 %{count} 个工作区发送停止信号
zh-CN.status.kill_open_list_first: Orchestrator：请先打开工作区列表（Ctrl+P → Orchestrator：打开）
zh-CN.status.kill_select_row: Orchestrator：请先选择一个工作区行
zh-CN.status.kill_dive_elsewhere: Orchestrator：请先切换到别处，然后再关闭此工作区
zh-CN.err.nothing_eligible: 所选内容中没有可%{action}的项
zh-CN.err.k8s_named_target: 命名的 .fresh/k8s.json 目标 — 请使用 “K8s: Connect Workspace”（完整的提供商支持）。内联附加需要显式指定 Pod。
zh-CN.err.k8s_ns_pod_required: Kubernetes：Namespace 和 Pod 为必填项（或使用 “K8s: Connect Workspace”）。
zh-CN.err.ssh_host_required: SSH：必须指定主机（host、user@host 或 ssh://host）。
zh-CN.err.devcontainer_unsupported: Devcontainer：请打开项目并运行 “Dev Containers: Reopen in Container”。（由 Orchestrator 管理的 devcontainer 工作区即将推出。）
